positive: An intricate, minimalist graphic illustration of a majestic stylized mountain range at dawn. The mountains should be rendered in bold, clean black silhouettes against a gradient sky of soft blush pink, pastel lavender, and warm peach. Include subtle, abstract geometric elements, such as simple overlapping triangles and arcs, radiating outwards from the base of the mountains to suggest energy and sunrise light. The composition must be centered and highly symmetrical. Use negative space effectively for maximum impact. The overall aesthetic should be retro-modern, clean, and highly scalable for apparel prints. High contrast, vector quality, tattoo design style, highly detailed linework, flat design.
negative: blurry, noise, text, words, logo, watermark, signature, messy, grain, artifacts, bad anatomy, low resolution, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts
